title: MiRiDom launches its official website
excerpt: Minority Rights Dominica is proud to announce the launch of its new website, a resource and information hub for Dominica's LGBTQ+ community.
content:
We are delighted to welcome you to our new website. This space was created to bring together our resources, news, and information for Dominica's LGBTQ+ community and its allies.

Our mission is to defend the fundamental rights of all people, regardless of their sexual orientation or gender identity.
author: MiRiDom

title: 2024 Report: LGBTQ+ Rights in the Caribbean
excerpt: A new report documents the evolution of LGBTQ+ rights across the Caribbean islands, with a focus on the progress and obstacles observed in Dominica.
content:
The 2024 annual report on LGBTQ+ rights in the Caribbean reveals significant advances in some islands, while challenges persist in other territories.

In Dominica, grassroots mobilization continues to bear fruit, with growing public awareness of fundamental rights.
author: MiRiDom
